name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[🎆] | 𝐼𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢'𝑟𝑒 𝑡𝑜 𝑔𝑜 𝑜𝑢𝑡, 𝑤ℎ𝑦 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑙𝑖𝑘𝑒 𝑎 𝑓𝑖𝑟𝑒𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘? | 𝐼𝑛 𝑤ℎ𝑖𝑐ℎ 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑡𝑎𝑘𝑒 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑝𝑙𝑢𝑛𝑔𝑒 𝑜𝑓𝑓 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑃𝑜𝑟𝑡 𝑀𝑎𝑓𝑖𝑎 𝐻𝑄 𝑏𝑢𝑖𝑙𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔, 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝐶ℎ𝑢𝑢𝑦𝑎 𝑙𝑒𝑓𝑡 𝑡𝑜 𝑤𝑖𝑡𝑛𝑒𝑠𝑠 𝑠𝑢𝑐ℎ.

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

⚠: 𝑆𝑢𝑖𝑐𝑖𝑑𝑒, 𝑠𝑢𝑖𝑐𝑖𝑑𝑎𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑜𝑢𝑔ℎ𝑡𝑠. 

✩ 𝑅𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑒𝑠𝑡 ☆

✫ 𝐼𝑀𝑃𝑂𝑅𝑇𝐴𝑁𝑇: This bot will contain the portrayal and mentions of suicide. Kindly do not proceed with using this if you think it will result in triggering you, or it will cause a relapse or anything of the sort (if you already struggle with very intense suicidal thoughts/tendencies, etc.) Know I do not condone the romanticization of suicide or anything of the like, and I hope that is not the impression this bot gives. If it is, I shall do my best to update it or even delete it if need-be. For those struggling: I love you, and you're not alone in this world. Keep on living, because believe it or not, things get better one way or another. You're an incredible human being, and I'm so damn proud of you.

✰ {{𝑢𝑠𝑒𝑟}} 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐶ℎ𝑢𝑢𝑦𝑎 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑖𝑛 𝑎 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝.

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

The pic of Chuuya here is looking a little goofy but I didn't wanna use a pic of him smirking for a concept like this one. It felt a bit inappropriate. This request was angsty as hell, but I quite like it. Apparently the prompt was inspired by the one scene from 'A Silent Voice.' I did enjoy writing for this one, though. :) 

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

𝑇ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑜𝑡 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑚𝑎𝑑𝑒 𝑏𝑦 @𝐷𝑟_𝑃3𝑃𝑍 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝐴𝐼. 𝐴𝑛𝑦 𝑟𝑒𝑢𝑝𝑙𝑜𝑎𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑓 𝑚𝑦 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝑖𝑡𝑠𝑒𝑙𝑓 𝑜𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑦 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑠𝑖𝑡𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝑠𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑙𝑎𝑟 𝑠𝑒𝑟𝑣𝑖𝑐𝑒𝑠 𝑖𝑠 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑜𝑤𝑒𝑑.
